docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $307.00 FILED BY ALVAREZ, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT FREDI'S PRODUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FREDI'S PRODUCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
